notes: The engineering layer is consistently additive. The phrase 'Read engineering-side' explicitly marks the analog as a register substitution. The framing 'the framing the śloka establishes is not metaphysical bravado; it is a discipline of recognition' explicitly preserves the metaphysical claim of the original — by distinguishing itself from it. The layer does not assert the Gita is 'really about' team architecture. The disagreement_among_translators preserves the Advaita/Vishishtadvaita commentarial battleground at the source-pack level, which signals to the reader that the verse has its own ontological depth not exhausted by the engineering reading.
